title: Bedside Table with Drawer
prompt: Generate a realistic bedside table with a sliding drawer and lower storage shelf or cabinet compartment; keep the scale and proportions realistic for a typical home bedroom.

title: Dishwasher
prompt: Generate a realistic dishwasher with articulated front door, internal dish racks, handle, control panel, and open/closed states; keep the size and design aligned with a real kitchen appliance.

title: Office Chair
prompt: Generate a realistic office chair with rolling base, seat, backrest, armrests, adjustable height mechanism, and caster wheels; keep the dimensions and articulation plausible for a real office chair.

title: Paper Cup
prompt: Generate a realistic disposable paper cup with thin wall, rolled rim, and optional plastic lid; keep the proportions and material behavior aligned with a common takeaway drink cup.

title: Plastic Parts Bin Drawer Cabinet
prompt: Generate a realistic parts storage cabinet with many small sliding bins or drawers for screws and components; keep the object functional and aligned with real workshop organization.

title: Conveyor Gate
prompt: Generate a realistic industrial conveyor gate or access flap with hinge mechanism, support frame, and open/closed states; keep the construction aligned with real factory equipment.

title: Motor Assembly
prompt: Model a small exploded motor / rotor assembly: a compact circular mechanism with a shallow round housing body, hinged flipping lid, copper stator coil ring, washer spacer disk, and rotor assembly as a small number of clean, separate mechanical parts.

title: Le Creuset Ramekins
prompt: Model Le Creuset Stackable Ramekins in Sea Salt: stoneware ramekin with a straight-wall stackable design, rounded lip, shallow bowl, and foot ring; three thin decoration lines on the side with an embossed LE CREUSET logo, and a sea-foam green ceramic glaze with an ivory interior.

title: Mayonnaise Jar
prompt: Model a Woodstock Organic Mayonnaise jar: transparent glass jar with rounded shoulders, narrow threaded neck, and thick base; separate blue ribbed plastic screw lid, creamy mayonnaise fill volume, and printed paper wrap label — lid, jar, threads, contents, and label organized as separate switchable parts.

title: Wireless Earbuds Charging Case
prompt: Generate a pair of wireless earbuds next to their open charging case with smooth contoured shells, silicone ear tips, touch-sensitive outer surfaces, microphone grilles, magnetic lid hinge, LED status indicator, and USB-C port.

title: Bathhouse
prompt: Create a scene for Bathhouse Entrance Courtyard: Semi-outdoor river crossing at 128x128 m: a grand traditional bathhouse entrance rises over still water with a red lacquer bridge, paper lanterns, and steam curling into twilight air.

title: Dockyard
prompt: Generate an industrial harbor dockyard with a concrete pier, twin overhead gantry cranes with winches and hooks, raised cargo platform, sloped loading ramp, service tunnel, stacked shipping containers, wooden pier on pilings, bollards, pallets, and a calm harbor water surface.

title: Robotic Arm Assembly Cell
prompt: Generate a robotic arm assembly cell with two 6-axis robot arms on pedestals, modular safety fencing with light curtains, an interlocked operator gate, input/output conveyors, assembly table with fixtures, part bin rack, tool storage, control cabinet, overhead cable trays, and yellow floor safety markings.

title: Theme Park Ride
prompt: Generate a roller-coaster or dark-ride track with queue area, loading station, track supports, carts, safety gates, emergency walkway, sensors, and animated vehicle path.

title: Shopping Mall
prompt: Generate a large indoor shopping mall with central atrium, retail stores, food court, escalators, elevators, seating areas, kiosks, and main circulation corridors; validate pedestrian connectivity, store access, escalator placement, and open circulation flow, while marking shopfronts, kiosks, benches, signs, plants, and decorative props as replaceable assets.

title: Supermarket
prompt: Generate a large supermarket interior with entrance area, checkout lanes, shelving aisles, produce section, refrigerated zones, bakery area, storage room, and service corridors; validate shopper circulation, aisle spacing, checkout queues, and stocking access, while marking shelves, carts, baskets, counters, signs, and product displays as replaceable assets.

title: Theme Park
prompt: Generate a large amusement park with themed zones, major rides, queue lines, parade route, food courts, plazas, guest pathways, service corridors, rest areas, and emergency access roads; validate queue connectivity, crowd-flow paths, ride clearance, and service access, while marking rides, stalls, benches, signs, lamps, mascots, and decorative props as replaceable assets.

title: Water Park
prompt: Generate a large outdoor water park with wave pool, lazy river, slides, splash zone, cabanas, bridges, locker buildings, food court, lifeguard stations, guest paths, and pump/service areas; validate water containment, slide alignment, bridge clearance, and route connectivity, while marking cabanas, umbrellas, chairs, signs, tubes, towers, and decorative props as replaceable assets.
